session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: I just adopted a golden retriever puppy named Max!

session_1.speaker: Bob
session_1.text: That's amazing! How old is Max?

session_1.speaker: Alice
session_1.text: He's 3 months old and already loves fetch.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Max chewed up my favorite shoes today.

session_2.speaker: Bob
session_2.text: Puppies love to chew! Get him some toys.

session_2.speaker: Alice
session_2.text: Good idea, I'll get some chew toys this weekend.

session_3.speaker: Alice
session_3.text: I started a new job as a software engineer at Google.

session_3.speaker: Bob
session_3.text: Congratulations! What team are you on?

session_3.speaker: Alice
session_3.text: The cloud infrastructure team. It's exciting!

session_summary.session_1_summary: Alice adopted a 3-month-old golden retriever puppy named Max who loves fetch.
session_summary.session_2_summary: Max chewed up Alice's shoes. Bob suggested getting chew toys.
session_summary.session_3_summary: Alice started a new software engineering job at Google on the cloud infrastructure team.

qa.question: What is the name of Alice's pet?
What happened after Alice got Max?
qa.answer: Max chewed up her favorite shoes
